arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou could consider two Tottenham changes vs Liverpool after positive injury update
arts.sum: Defeating Southampton 5-0 last weekend and getting the better of Manchester United on Thursday to secure a place in the Carabao Cup semi-finals, Ange Postecoglou's side will be intent on making it three successive wins. After a busy week following the Southampton and Manchester United fixtures, the Spurs boss could do with adding some fresh legs into the side as Liverpool are going to be a very tough test .
